title: Sky Temple
description: This datapack adds the sky temple structure: a structure generated in the sky, containing a custom vault, a boss with custom loots and a giant mask (when wore, it turns you into a giant)
body:
## Giant Mask's abilities (loot of the sky temple)
By being a giant, you're able to punch mobs and place blocks from further away

### The custom vault can loot
- enchanted golden apple
- trident
- diamonds
- diamond block
- netherite scrape (very rare)
- golden carrots
- 


You'll need an ominous trial key to open it (can be looted from the boss if you don't have one)

## Custom Boss

- 100 hearts
- Can launch powerful fireballs
- Is surrounded by minions
- Use the mace


The boss has 2 phases: he'll first shoot fireballs at you, but once you've sent one back to him, he'll start to run quickly to you and attack you with the mace.

The temple is surrounded by Trial spawners, making it harder to kill the boss

## Temple location

The temple is hard to reach because it often spawns over the ocean, and is mostly visible from its small shadow
